title: Japanese-Style Stir Fry with Oats
description: A unique twist on traditional stir fries, this dish combines the nutty flavor of oats with the savory taste of Japanese ingredients. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and stir-fry until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the Japanese stir fry and cook until the vegetables are tender-crisp, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in the gooey oats and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
